title: Sanction and Sin
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: The third Warhammer Crime anthology gathers nine short stories from across the choking hive of Varangantua — sanctioners and gangers, devout citizens and the cults that prey on them, syndicates so large they amount to a second government. J. S. Collyer, Mike Brooks, Gary Kloster, Victoria Hayward, Jonathan D. Beer, Jude Reid and Danie Ware (among others) take turns at the door: a ballot count run by killers, a bodyguarding job that turns into an ambush, a confession dragged out of a fire, an enforcer's siege in the spires of Ismyr. The collection's pleasure is breadth, not arc; it pans the camera across a city where almost everyone is both the law's target and the law's last hope.
